title: 3 Trading Mistakes That Cost Me Thousands
description: These common ICT trading mistakes destroyed my account before I learned the truth. Avoid these costly errors and start trading like a pro.
script: These three mistakes destroyed my trading account. Wish I knew this earlier. Mistake one. Trading every single setup. Quality over quantity always wins. Mistake two. Ignoring market structure. Structure determines everything in ICT. Mistake three. Revenge trading losses. Emotional trading kills accounts fast. Master these concepts properly. Follow R2F Trading for more tips like this.

3 Trading Mistakes That Cost Me Thousands

These common ICT trading mistakes destroyed my account before I learned the truth. Avoid these costly errors and start trading like a pro.
